'''waguku''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oegopsid|oegopsid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-g-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oegopsid|oegopsid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| waguku
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:wægikith|wægikith]] || [[word:wægikij|wægikij]] || [[word:wægikish|wægikish]] || [[word:wægiki|wægiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:wagugukuth|wagugukuth]] || [[word:wagugukuj|wagugukuj]] || [[word:wagugukush|wagugukush]] || [[word:waguguku|waguguku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:wagukuth|wagukuth]] || [[word:wagukuj|wagukuj]] || [[word:wagukush|wagukush]] || [[word:waguku|waguku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:wagufkufth|wagufkufth]] || [[word:wagufkufj|wagufkufj]] || [[word:wagufkufsh|wagufkufsh]] || [[word:wagufkuf|wagufkuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wagukuthu|wagukuthu]] || [[word:wagukuju|wagukuju]] || [[word:wagukushu|wagukushu]] || [[word:wagukuku|wagukuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wagukuth|wagukuth]] || [[word:wagukuj|wagukuj]] || [[word:wagukush|wagukush]] || [[word:waguku|waguku]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wagukuthul|wagukuthul]] || [[word:wagukujul|wagukujul]] || [[word:wagukushul|wagukushul]] || [[word:wagukukul|wagukukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wagukuuthuthu|wagukuuthuthu]] || [[word:wagukuujuju|wagukuujuju]] || [[word:wagukuushushu|wagukuushushu]] || [[word:wagukuuku|wagukuuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wagukuthun|wagukuthun]] || [[word:wagukujun|wagukujun]] || [[word:wagukushun|wagukushun]] || [[word:wagukukun|wagukukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wagukuthuoro|wagukuthuoro]] || [[word:wagukujuoro|wagukujuoro]] || [[word:wagukushuoro|wagukushuoro]] || [[word:wagukukuoro|wagukukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d5728ff}}
